title: stachys leucoglossa var. samothracica
intro: Stachys leucoglossa var. samothracica, also known as White-tinged Betony, is a variety of plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, known for its distinctive white-tinged leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of White-tinged Betony include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its calming effects and ability to soothe the stomach. In terms of herbal preparations, White-tinged Betony is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal blends.
